title: oenothera biennis f. argillicola
intro: Oenothera biennis f. argillicola, also known as a subspecies of Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and potentially alleviating symptoms of depression and anxiety. Oenothera biennis f. argillicola can be prepared into herbal supplements, capsules, or oils, making it a convenient addition to one's wellness routine.
